experiment: Exp 60 Extension: Potts Fisher Information Matrix

parameters.features: 6D local: energy, |mag|, C_v, chi, nearest-neighbor correlation, domain_wall_density

interpretation.key_finding: Potts features ARE sensitive to temperature (F_tt=3180 > Ising 1512), BUT PCA's variance-maximizing direction is MISALIGNED with the Fisher-stiff direction
interpretation.mechanism: PCA maximizes total variance (within-group + between-group). For Potts, within-group fluctuations dominate and point AWAY from the between-group (T-sensitive) direction. For Ising, within-group and between-group directions are nearly parallel.
interpretation.diagnostic_value: cos(Fisher_direction, PCA_PC1) is a computable pre-flight check: >0.8 → PCA-FSS works, <0.3 → PCA-FSS fails
